content:
Pisces November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Refine the belief, restore the roots
Key Dates Venus + Mercury station direct Nov 13 / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 9th house — fellow water sign) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 (Leo, your 6th) / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (4th house)
Love Scorpio New Moon in your 9th house reopens belief-rooted love; the 4th house Full Moon brings family-rooted matters to a climax
Career 9th house Scorpio New Moon is a publishing, study, and meaning fresh start; Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 6th amps daily work
Crystal of the Month Obsidian
Lucky Colors Deep black, sea-foam green, misted white
Lucky Number 4
Affirmation I refine the belief October softened; I restore the roots that hold me.

This Month’s Energy

Pisces, November 2026 refines the belief and restores the roots. Venus and Mercury both station direct on November 13, releasing October’s retrograde season. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 9th house of belief, study, travel, publishing, and meaning — and Scorpio is a fellow water sign, so this New Moon resonates deeply. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo, your 6th house of work, routine, and health — a peak daily-work and wellness moment. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 4th house of home, family, and inner foundation — a climax around a long-building home or family matter. November’s pattern: refine the belief early, restore the roots late.

Key Dates for Pisces in November 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Pisces Do / Avoid
Nov 8 New Moon in Scorpio (water sign — your 9th house) 9th house — fresh start in belief, study, travel, publishing, meaning; a fellow water sign’s New Moon resonates deeply with your emotional body Do: commit to the course, publish the work, take the trip, claim the belief
Avoid: holding onto a worldview you’ve outgrown
Nov 13 Venus + Mercury station direct Station day — the retrograde season ends; clarity returns to belief, communication, and relationship matters Do: move forward on the belief, send the message, sign the agreement
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16 Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo 6th house — work, routine, health, daily systems peak; a once-every-two-years amplification of daily work and wellness Do: commit to the routine, organize the systems, address the health
Avoid: pushing the body past its natural pace at the peak
Nov 24 Beaver Full Moon in Gemini 4th house — climax around home, family, inner foundation; a long-building property, move, or family matter matures Do: move the home, mend the family tie, organize the inner foundation
Avoid: forcing a major property decision without research
Nov 22 Sun enters Sagittarius 10th house season — career, public role, reputation through late December Do: claim the title, ship the public work, lead
Avoid: hiding from visibility
Early Nov Mars moves through Leo (your 6th) Work, routine, health stay active; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the wellness momentum Do: refine the routine, organize the workflow, schedule the health practice
Avoid: ignoring the body’s signals

Career & Money

For Pisces, November’s career story opens with meaning and peaks with daily work. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 falls in your 9th house of publishing, study, and meaning — a fresh start in the bigger picture. Publish the work; commit to the course.

Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 6th house on November 16 amps daily work, routine, and wellness — a once-every-two-years push. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 10th house of career) on November 22 opens the public-role season. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 4th house) may shift the work-from-home balance. Crystals for wealth can support the push; the practical move is refine the belief early, restore the roots late.

Love & Relationships

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 in your 9th house of belief is the love signature of the month for Pisces — and Scorpio is a fellow water sign, so this New Moon resonates deeply with your emotional body. Belief-rooted love reopens: a worldview difference, a teaching or travel tie, or a meaning-rooted connection.

The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 falls in your 4th house of home and family — a long-building home-rooted or family-rooted matter reaches a climax. Venus stationing direct on November 13 releases the belief and meaning review. Crystals for love can support the reopening; the deeper practice is refining the belief so the roots can hold the bond.

Health & Wellness

November’s wellness story emphasizes the feet, lymph, and emotional body. The Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 6th house on November 16 amps the daily-work and wellness focus — a once-every-two-years peak. Commit to the sustainable rhythm.

Obsidian, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with grounding, protection, truth-telling, and the release of old emotional patterns — a useful symbolic companion for a Neptune/Jupiter-ruled water sign emerging from a retrograde season. Pisces often carries tension in the feet, lymph system, and emotional body; gentle foot massage, warm baths, and lymph-supporting movement are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Obsidian

Why Obsidian fits Pisces this month. You are Neptune- and Jupiter-ruled — your reflex is empathy, merging, the dissolution of boundary. November asks you to refine the belief (your 9th house, Jupiter’s natural domain) while restoring the roots. Obsidian — volcanic glass, deep black — is traditionally tied to grounding, protection, truth-telling, and the release of old emotional patterns. Where Amethyst would clarify and Aquamarine would cool, Obsidian shields the watery depths so the truth can land. Perfect for the 9th house Scorpio New Moon (refine the belief) and the 4th house Gemini Full Moon (restore the roots).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Obsidian at your front door or the foundation of your home on November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Carry it during any work-routine or family conversation through November 24.

Best date to use it: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 4th house — hold Obsidian at your root for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming the roots you’re restoring after the belief refinement.

Read more: Obsidian Meaning and Best Crystals for Pisces.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Pisces — November 2026

When: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 4th house.
Crystal: Obsidian.
Intention: Restore the roots the belief was meant to serve.

  1. Cleanse Obsidian under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Place it at your front door or the foundation of your home through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (November 8–24): write down three beliefs you’re refining — and the home-rooted matter you’re ready to address at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Beaver Full Moon on November 24: organize the home, mend the family tie, restore the foundation. Obsidian in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Pisces New Moon in March 2027 (your 1st house — birthday New Moon): how has the belief matured through the winter? Hold Obsidian during the review.

Shop Pisces Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Pisces crystal guide for stones connected with grounding, protection, belief, and the home — including the Obsidian that shields the watery depths during a belief-refining season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Pisces November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Pisces?

It’s a refine-and-restore month. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 9th house, a fellow water sign) is a belief and meaning fresh start. Venus and Mercury station direct on November 13. The Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 (your 6th house) is a daily-work and wellness peak. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 4th house) is a home and family climax.

How will the Scorpio New Moon on November 8 affect Pisces?

It falls in your 9th house of belief, study, travel, and meaning — and Scorpio is a fellow water sign, so the resonance is deep. After October’s Venus retrograde review of belief-rooted matters, this New Moon is the green light for refining the worldview and publishing the work.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Pisces?

It falls in your 4th house of home, family, and inner foundation — a climax around a long-building property, move, or family matter. Restore the roots; mend the family tie; organize the home.

What is the best crystal for Pisces in November 2026?

Obsidian — it shields the watery depths during belief-refinement, exactly what a 9th house Scorpio New Moon (refine the belief) plus a 4th house Gemini Full Moon (restore the roots) demand. See the full Pisces crystal guide →

Why does the Mars conjunct Jupiter in my 6th house matter for Pisces?

The November 16 conjunction in your 6th house of work, routine, and health is a once-every-two-years amplification of daily work and wellness. Commit to the routine; organize the systems; address the body’s needs — the sustainable rhythm carries through winter.
